reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It's very quiet to rest your body and wake up after a two-hour drive. A very good cup of coffee.

reviews.comment:
Un clásico para los viajeros de la ruta 2. Baños muy limpios, buen espacio para tomar algo y pelotero. Suele haber cola para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
A classic stop for Route 2 travelers. Very clean restrooms, good space for a drink, and a children's play area. There's usually a line for fuel.

reviews.comment:
Es casi una parada obligada en la ruta 2 a Mar del Plata. Podría ser más ágil la fila para la carga de combustible. Además en época picó podrían destinar algunas personas a organizar el tráfico vehicular interno porque se torna caótico. Amplísimo lugar para parar y estirar las piernas un poco así como para ir al baño. Cuenta con baños públicos

(Translated by Google)
It's practically a mandatory stop on Route 2 to Mar del Plata. The fuel line could be quicker. Also, during peak season, they could assign some people to manage the internal traffic because it gets chaotic. There's plenty of space to stop and stretch your legs, as well as to use the restroom. It has public restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBbmZPekp3EAE
